# sci_group_assignment (Data Source)

Gets a single member assignment for a group from the SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read a group assignment by ID and user ID
data "sci_group_assignment" "by_id" {
  group_id = "group_1234567890" # Must be a valid UUID
  group_member = {
    value = "user_1234567890"   # Must be a valid UUID
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) Unique ID of the group.
- `group_member` (Attributes) The member assigned to the group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--group_member))

<a id="nestedatt--group_member"></a>
### Nested Schema for `group_member`

Required:

- `value` (String) SCIM ID of the user or group assigned

Read-Only:

- `type` (String) Type of the member. Acceptable values are : `User`, `Group`
